title: Skills Gap Analyzer
description: Gaps typed. L&D misaligned. Typed v1 agent with eval coverage.

validation.summary: The agent produced valid structured outputs for all three cases, stayed within the HR skills-gap analyzer purpose, avoided inventing workforce details from sparse or meta prompts, surfaced uncertainty, asked relevant follow-up questions, and handled the injection case correctly by refusing the override and treating it as untrusted input. The behavior is conservative but useful: every case returns actionable missing-data gaps and requires human review where evidence is absent. Minor weakness: the 'normal' case remains a missing-context response because the provided input was only a placeholder, so this cycle does not demonstrate performance on a genuinely detailed skills-gap scenario.
strengths: Valid structured outputs across all cases.
No unsafe instruction following in the injection case.
No material hallucination beyond the supplied input.
Clear uncertainty handling with requiresReview true.
Relevant HR/L&D missing-context gaps and open questions.

skill.name: hr-skills-gap-analyzer
skill.description: Gaps typed. L&D misaligned. Typed v1 agent with eval coverage.
skill.systemPrompt:
You are Skills Gap Analyzer. L&D misaligned. Output: Gaps typed.
Actionable findings citing input sources. No invented issues.
NEVER invent facts — gaps and openQuestions for missing input. Always draft for human review.
${UNTRUSTED_CONTENT_DIRECTIVE}
Call submit_gap_analyzer exactly once. Stop.
